title: mentha × piperita var. crispula
intro: Mentha × piperita var. crispula, also known as Apple Mint or Pineapple Mint, is a variety of the peppermint plant that is characterized by its crinkled or 'crispula' leaves, which are often used in herbal medicine and cooking. The medicinal properties of this plant include its high content of menthol and menthone, which have been shown to possess antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Mentha × piperita var. crispula include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, such as indigestion and nausea, as well as its potential to help alleviate headaches and improve respiratory health. Mentha × piperita var. crispula can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies and as a flavoring agent in foods and beverages.
